ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component for which the metric was collected */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the component */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput of the component */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the component */,
  "mem_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the component */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate of the component */,
  "availability" REAL /* Availability of the component */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage of the component */,
  "network_in" REAL /* Incoming network traffic for the component */,
  "network_out" REAL /* Outgoing network traffic for the component */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node for which the metric was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., front-end, carts, catalogue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment of the component (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., IP5, IP6, IP7) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., online, offline, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_metrics" (
  "node_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node metric */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node for which the metric was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  "node_load" REAL /* Node load of the node */,
  "cpu_temp" REAL /* CPU temperature of the node */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage of the node */,
  "network_in" REAL /* Incoming network traffic for the node */,
  "network_out" REAL /* Outgoing network traffic for the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation for the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was made */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the annotation (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_annotations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, QA) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
